task_completion.description: Read the nacelle integration specification document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/nacelle_integration_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the base model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP application is open, displaying the eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 model (showing wing and tail geometry) in the 3D view and Geometry Browser.

task_completion.description: Add a new Pod component for the nacelle
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Pod' component is added and visible in the OpenVSP Geometry Browser.

task_completion.description: Set the nacelle dimensions according to the spec
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry dialog for the Pod shows Length set to 3.0 and Diameter set to 1.6.

task_completion.description: Set the nacelle XYZ position according to the spec
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP XForm tab for the Pod shows Location X = 7.5, Y = 5.0, and Z = -1.2.

task_completion.description: Enable XZ planar symmetry to generate the port-side engine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sym tab for the Pod shows XZ symmetry enabled, OR two nacelles are clearly visible on opposite sides of the aircraft in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Save the updated model to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the OpenVSP window title shows the file being saved as eCRM-001_with_nacelles.vsp3 in the ~/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenVSP dialogs, menus, and the 3D workspace, rather than just editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual base model
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view contains the original wing and tail components alongside the new nacelles, not just a blank workspace.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP file menu or save dialog is visible, indicating a genuine save operation rather than a terminal copy command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact specifications for the nacelle are: Length = 3.0, Diameter = 1.6, X = 7.5, Y = 5.0, Z = -1.2. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_with_nacelles.vsp3. Note: The programmatic verifier for this task is broken (it searches for incorrect XML tags), so visual confirmation of these parameters in the OpenVSP GUI is the only way to verify correctness.
